title: Savory Tandoori Spanish Squid Crumble
description: A smoky, glutenfree squid dish with a tandoori rub and a crumbly fetaonion topping, perfect for a lazy Sunday dinner.
instructions: Pat the squid rings dry and toss them with tandoori spice mix, Greek yogurt, lemon juice, olive oil and a pinch of salt until evenly coated.
Let the mixture marinate for 10 minutes while you prep the crumble topping.
Heat a non‑stick skillet over medium‑high heat; add the marinated squid in a single layer and cook for 2–3 minutes on each side until just opaque.
In the same skillet, sauté the diced onion until translucent, then sprinkle the crumbled feta over the onions.
Continue cooking for another 2 minutes, letting the feta soften and slightly brown.
Transfer the cooked squid to a serving dish, spoon the feta‑onion crumble over it, and garnish with chopped cilantro.
Serve hot with a squeeze of fresh lemon and a side of crusty gluten‑free bread if desired.
